subject: [RFC PATCH v4 17/27] mm/oom: NP_OPS_OOM_ELIGIBLE - private node OOM participation

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Introduced a new flag NP_OPS_OOM_ELIGIBLE to indicate whether a private node is OOM-eligible. Updated oom killer to check for this eligibility before selecting a task to kill.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new flag NP_OPS_OOM_ELIGIBLE to indicate whether a private node is OOM-eligible, meaning it can participate in reclaim and demotion. It updates the oom killer to check for this eligibility before selecting a task to kill. The patch also removes an unused function cpuset_mems_allowed_intersects() and updates constrained_alloc() to use zone_oom_eligible() for constraint detection.
